title: Automation To Select & Update All Items
excerpt:
Hello Monday Fam! 
Is it possible to select and update/change status of all items on a board via a button or similar 1 click function?

posts.author: JaredJLY (Jared Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday Fam!

Is it possible to select and update/change status of all items on a board via a button or similar 1 click function?

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JaredJLY,

You can select all items in a group (by clicking checkbox in the top left corner) and changing status for one item will change it for all selected items.

Is that what you’re looking for?

posts.author: JaredJLY (Jared Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning!

No, this is not what I am looking for. I am hoping there is a way that I can select all items in a group and change the status of these items by updating another item or through pressing a button.

posts.author: MarigoldsInMay (Darielle Shandler)
posts.cookedHtml: It might work if you created an automation where the condition is “only if status is xx” - so if any/all of the items on the board have a certain status, they would all be updated based on whatever trigger you set.
